description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/ClearMind to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to confirm the project builds without errors
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` completes successfully with exit code 0
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it succeeds
findings: npm install added 349 packages successfully. npm run build completed in 3.54s with exit code 0. There is a chunk size warning (916KB JS bundle > 500KB limit) but no errors. node_modules and dist/ are gitignored.
